title: Urban Projects
description: Research on large-scale urban modeling, simulation, and visualization including city-scale reconstruction and analysis.

title: U-Tree
description: Monitoring and analyzing urban tree canopy across the United States using generative AI and remote sensing techniques.

title: Computational Archaeology
description: Applying computational methods and visual computing to archaeological site analysis, reconstruction, and preservation.

title: PERSEUS
description: A comprehensive framework for urban scene understanding, reconstruction, and simulation at scale.
